prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次大幅后移的走势、2 026年招生计划小幅缩招（-4%）、湖南省物理类考生显著增加（+8.37%）、学校声誉偏正面及抖音热度较热等因素，预计2026年竞争较2025年略有加剧但位次不会回到2024年水平 。预测最低录取位次约14464名，区间13964–14964名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Lanzhou University in Hunan Province Physics Category were approximately 9702, 11574, 11459, 11375, and 14618 respectively. From 2021 to 2024, rankings fluctuated narrowly within the 9700–11600 range, but in 2025 there was a significant backward shift, dropping about 3243 places compared to 2024, with a baseline ranking of 14618. The enrollment plan for Lanzhou University in Hunan Province Physics Category was 106 in 2021, 112 in 2022, 110 in 2023, 113 in 2024, and 124 in 2025. The 2026 enrollment plan is 119, a decrease of 5 from 2025, a reduction of about 4%, which slightly intensifies competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Lanzhou University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Ranking, it ranks 40th, belonging to the top-tier comprehensive universities in China, with stable educational level and overall strength. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, Lanzhou University's reputation evaluation is relatively positive, mainly due to a master's graduate thanking the security department in their thesis acknowledgments for allowing a scrap collector to enter the campus, demonstrating humanistic care and enhancing social goodwill. The Douyin popularity evaluation is relatively hot, ranking 53rd overall, with short video platform attention at an upper-middle level, which has a moderate boosting effect on application enthusiasm. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Lanzhou University has two top-tier disciplines: Ecology A+ and Grassland Science A+, as well as advantageous disciplines such as Chemistry A-, Geography A-, and Biology A-. It has significant competitiveness in basic sciences and earth ecology fields, strongly attracting related major applicants.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: 2026 major popularity data shows that engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to be highly recommended, which highly aligns with Lanzhou University's Physics Category enrollment majors (Computer Science, Electronic Information, Mathematics, Physics, etc.). The rising popularity of hot majors may push up overall competition. In 2026, the number of Physics Category examinees in Hunan Province is about 347,000, an increase of about 26,800 (+8.37%) compared to 2025, and the expansion of the examinee pool intensifies competition within the province. Lanzhou University is located in Lanzhou City, Gansu Province, in the northwest region, and it is a cross-provincial enrollment for Hunan. In terms of regional preference, Hunan examinees have some geographical distance considerations for universities in the northwest, but the brand effect of Lanzhou University as a 985 university can partially offset the regional disadvantage.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant backward shift in rankings in 2025, the slight reduction in enrollment plan for 2026 (-4%), the notable increase in Physics Category examinees in Hunan Province (+8.37%), the relatively positive university reputation, and the relatively hot Douyin popularity, it is expected that competition in 2026 will be slightly more intense than in 2025, but rankings will not return to the 2024 level. The predicted minimum admission ranking is approximately 14464, with a range of 13964–14964.

Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)

- Economics (including Base Class)
- Materials Science

- Civil Engineering (Smart Civil Engineering Innovation Class)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 13964–14964, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choices, use Tier 1 majors (Computer Science, Electronic Information, Mathematics, Stomatology) as reach options, and Tier 3 majors (Business Administration, Materials Science, Environmental Science, etc.) as safe backups. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 13900), you can focus on reaching for Tier 1 flagship majors.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Lanzhou University in Hunan Province's History Category were approximately 2362, 2366, 2289, 2236, and 2650 respectively. From 2021 to 2024, rankings fluctuated narrowly within the 2236–2366 range. In 2025, there was a significant backward shift, dropping about 414 places compared to 2024, with a baseline ranking of 2650. The enrollment plan for Lanzhou University in Hunan's History Category was 38 in 2021, 37 in 2022, 32 in 2023, 32 in 2024, and 28 in 2025. The 2026 enrollment plan is 32, an increase of 4 from 2025, an expansion of about 14.3%, which helps alleviate competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Lanzhou University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Ranking, it ranks 40th, with its educational level and comprehensive strength among the top in the country. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, Lanzhou University's reputation evaluation is slightly positive. The humanities event where a master's graduate thanked the security department has enhanced social goodwill. Its Douyin popularity evaluation is relatively hot, ranking 53rd overall, with mid-to-high attention on short video platforms, which has a moderate boosting effect on application enthusiasm. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Lanzhou University has advantageous disciplines such as Ecology A+, Grass Science A+, Chemistry A-, Geography A-, and Biology A-. Although the History Category enrollment majors (Chinese Language and Literature, Law, Journalism and Communication, History, etc.) do not directly correspond to A-level disciplines, Lanzhou University, as a comprehensive university, has a solid foundation in humanities and social sciences.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: 2026 major popularity data shows that law, Chinese language/Chinese literature, and other liberal arts majors are recommended, while journalism and communication are clearly discouraged. Among the History Category enrollment majors, Law (including the International Rule of Law Innovation Class) has high popularity, Chinese Language and Literature is recommended, and Journalism and Communication majors have low popularity. In 2026, there are approximately 187,000 History Category examinees in Hunan Province, an increase of about 44,453 (+31.2%) compared to 2025. The significant expansion of the examinee pool intensifies competition within the province. Provincial control line data for 2026 is missing. Lanzhou University is located in Lanzhou City, Gansu Province, in the northwest region. Hunan examinees have some geographical distance considerations for northwestern universities, but the brand effect of a 985 university can partially offset the regional disadvantage.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the backward shift trend in 2025 rankings, the 2026 enrollment plan expansion (+14.3%), the significant increase in Hunan History Category examinees (+31.2%), and the slightly positive school reputation, the expansion and examinee increase have a hedging effect on competition. It is predicted that the 2026 ranking will be slightly further back compared to 2025. The predicted minimum admission ranking is approximately 2957, with a range of 2513–3401.
